stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, what changes apply to the missed approach procedure on RWY 26L?

>>> EDDT BERLIN TEGEL RWY 08RL/26LR <<< DUE TO MAINT OF TGL DME THE FLW CHANGES TO MISSED APCH PROC OCCUR: CONVENTIONAL MISSED APPROACH PROCEDURE CHANGED AS FOLLOWS: RWY 08 L/R: CLIMB INBOUND GL NDB FREQ. 321.0 TO MAX. 3000. AT GL NDB CONTINUE CLIMB TO 5000 AND LT VIA LWB DVOR TO LANUM. RWY 26 L/R: CLIMB INBOUND RW NDB FREQ. 392.0 TO MAX. 3000. AT RW NDB CONTINUE CLIMB TO 4000 AND RT VIA LWB DVOR TO NASAT. REF AD 2 EDDT 4-2-1 THRU 4-2-3 AND 4-4-1 THRU 4-6-3 ALL DATED 22 AUG 2013, 4-2-4 DATED 21 AUG 2014, 4-6-4 EFF 3 JUN 2010. : NOTAM ED/A0610/16 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<

options.a: CLIMB INBOUND GL NDB FREQ. 321.0 TO MAX. 3000.
options.b: CLIMB INBOUND RW NDB FREQ. 392.0 TO MAX. 5000.
options.c: AT GL NDB CONTINUE CLIMB TO 5000 AND LT VIA LWB DVOR TO LANUM.
options.d: CLIMB INBOUND RW NDB FREQ. 392.0 TO MAX. 3000.
